name: Disco Dancers
teaser: Duplicate the effects caused by standard actions on minions, thus increasing the number of affected minions.
mechanics: Duplicate the effects caused by standard actions on minions, thus increasing the number of affected minions.

name: Kung Fu Fighters
teaser: Generate +1 power counters, drain them from any minions, even other players', and destroy weaker minions.
mechanics: Generate +1 power counters, drain them from any minions, even other players', and destroy weaker minions.

name: Truckers
teaser: Transfer play-on-base actions around in order to move your minions, and mess with other players' play-on-base actions, either by transferring them elsewhere or taking control of them.
mechanics: Transfer play-on-base actions around in order to move your minions, and mess with other players' play-on-base actions, either by transferring them elsewhere or taking control of them.

name: Vigilantes
teaser: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a team of seven power-4 minions with powerful and oppressive abilities, including hard removal, power boost and retaliation.
mechanics: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a team of seven power-4 minions with powerful and oppressive abilities, including hard removal, power boost and retaliation.
